creator: jamiefinnigan@gmail.com
text:
Would you consider making the default build for the security/nmap port include ndiff?

It's currently included in security/zenmap, but that also has a lot of GUI-related dependencies that I would rather not install.


In order to do so, I manually remove the --without-ndiff line from CONFIGURE_ARGS in the port Makefile and add relevant entries to pkg-plist:
$ grep ndiff /usr/ports/security/nmap/pkg-plist
bin/ndiff
lib/python2.7/site-packages/ndiff.py
share/man/man1/ndiff.1
